name: Diabolica the Draconique General
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディアボリカ
desc: If a Fiend monster(s), except "Diabolica the Draconique General", is sent to your GY by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Fiend monster in your GY, except "Diabolica the Draconique General"; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Diabolica the Draconique General" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If a Fiend monster(s), except "Diabolica the Draconique General", is sent to your GY by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Fiend monster in your GY, except "Diabolica the Draconique General"; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Diabolica the Draconique General" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If a Fiend monster(s), except "Diabolica the Draconique General", is sent to your GY by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Fiend monster in your GY, except "Diabolica the Draconique General"; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Diabolica the Draconique General" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
